title: hoheria × sexangusta
intro: Hoheria × sexangusta is a hybrid plant species derived from the intersection of Hoheria glabrata and Hoheria populnea, both native to New Zealand. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hoheria × sexangusta include the reduction of inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and potential antimicrobial activity. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tincture or infused oil for use in herbal medicine.
